title: Mildly Pungent Uruguayan Lettuce Salad
description: A light and refreshing salad featuring baby lettuce leaves, inspired by Uruguayan cuisine, with a mildly pungent flavor profile, vegan-friendly and prepared on a tava-griddle.
instructions: Preheat the tava-griddle over medium heat to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together namul seasoning, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper to make the dressing.
Add the baby lettuce leaves to the bowl and toss gently to coat with the dressing.
Namul-blanch the lettuce leaves by quickly heating them on the preheated tava-griddle for 30 seconds to 1 minute, then immediately transferring them to an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
Once the lettuce has cooled, drain the excess water and return it to the bowl.
Toss the lettuce gently to redistribute the dressing.
Sprinkle chopped fresh cilantro over the top, if using.
Serve the salad immediately, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
